Package microui.core.effect

Class SpatialAnimator

java.lang.Object
microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
public final class SpatialAnimator extends Object
Animator for smooth interpolation of spatial properties (position and dimensions) between states. Provides flexible animation control with configurable reaction modes and conditional triggering.

The SpatialAnimator animates a target SpatialView between defined start and end states, with support for both SpatialState objects and ContentView references. It includes configurable reaction modes (Reactive and Trigger) and separate controls for position and dimension animations.

See Also:
  • SpatialView
  • ContentView
  • SpatialState
  • Timer

  • Constructor Details

    • SpatialAnimator

      public SpatialAnimator(SpatialState startSpatialState, SpatialState endSpatialState, BooleanSupplier condition)
      Constructs a SpatialAnimator with SpatialState objects and a condition.
      Parameters:
      startSpatialState - the starting spatial state (cannot be null)
      endSpatialState - the ending spatial state (cannot be null)
      condition - the condition supplier for animation control (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any parameter is null

    • SpatialAnimator

      public SpatialAnimator(ContentView start, SpatialState end, BooleanSupplier condition)
      Constructs a SpatialAnimator with a starting ContentView and ending SpatialState.
      Parameters:
      start - the starting ContentView (cannot be null)
      end - the ending spatial state (cannot be null)
      condition - the condition supplier for animation control (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any parameter is null

    • SpatialAnimator

      public SpatialAnimator(SpatialState start, ContentView end, BooleanSupplier condition)
      Constructs a SpatialAnimator with a starting SpatialState and ending ContentView.
      Parameters:
      start - the starting spatial state (cannot be null)
      end - the ending ContentView (cannot be null)
      condition - the condition supplier for animation control (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any parameter is null

    • SpatialAnimator

      public SpatialAnimator(ContentView start, ContentView end, BooleanSupplier condition)
      Constructs a SpatialAnimator with both starting and ending ContentViews.
      Parameters:
      start - the starting ContentView (cannot be null)
      end - the ending ContentView (cannot be null)
      condition - the condition supplier for animation control (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any parameter is null

      public boolean isPositionEnabled()
      Checks if position animation is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if position animation is enabled, false otherwise

    • setPositionEnabled

      public SpatialAnimator setPositionEnabled(boolean isPositionEnabled)
      Enables or disables position animation.
      Parameters:
      isPositionEnabled - true to enable position animation, false to disable
      Returns:
      this SpatialAnimator for method chaining

      Checks if dimension animation is enabled.

      Enables or disables dimension animation.

      Returns:
      this SpatialAnimator for method chaining

      Returns the target SpatialView being animated.
      Returns:
      the target SpatialView, or null if not set

    • setTargetSpatialView

      public SpatialAnimator setTargetSpatialView(SpatialView targetSpatialView)
      Sets the target SpatialView to animate.
      Parameters:
      targetSpatialView - the SpatialView to animate (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      this SpatialAnimator for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if targetSpatialView is null

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Checks if the animator is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if enabled, false if disabled

    • setEnabled

      public SpatialAnimator setEnabled(boolean isEnabled)
      Enables or disables the animator.
      Parameters:
      isEnabled - true to enable the animator, false to disable
      Returns:
      this SpatialAnimator for method chaining

    • update

      public void update()
      Updates the animation based on current conditions and timer state. Interpolates position and dimensions between start and end states. Should be called every frame for smooth animation.
